category_sources: source_facts.description says configurable static site generator; official Hugo documentation describes Hugo as a framework for building websites.
display_name_sources: Official website and documentation use Hugo; source_facts.name is hugo.
docs_sources: Official Hugo site has a dedicated documentation section at /documentation/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a static site generator; official documentation covers CLI, content management, templates, and site building.
